race.comment: SHANGRI LA IMPACT (14) tough on-pace mare who grows a leg in the heavy conditions. Kept up to the mark with a 1200m trial placing at Randwick. Can keep the winning momentum going in this tougher race. BELLE DETELLE (12) will enjoy getting her toe into the ground and jump in trip. Got too far back at Warwick Farm when resuming over a trip far short of his best. Rises sharply second-up and can run a big race. SIR DINADAN (1) was good through the line at Gosford over the line in The Coast and should be hitting his straps now fourth-up. Just has to carry the big weight. MISTER RIZZ (2) couldn't quite live up to market expectation fresh at Scone in a strong CL1 but looked to have found a smart one. Happy to follow up with that run under his belt.
